scripts.dev: concurrently --names build,sandbox "pnpm --filter @adobe/alloy run build:watch" "pnpm --filter @adobe/alloy-sandbox-browser run start"
scripts.test: pnpm exec playwright install chromium && vitest run
scripts.test:coverage: rimraf coverage && pnpm exec playwright install chromium && vitest run --coverage
scripts.test:unit: pnpm exec playwright install chromium && vitest run --project=core/unit --project=browser/unit --project=reactor-extension/unit
scripts.test:unit:debug: pnpm exec playwright install chromium && vitest --no-file-parallelism --project=core/unit --project=browser/unit --project=reactor-extension/unit --browser=chromium --browser.provider=playwright --browser.headless=false
scripts.test:unit:watch: pnpm exec playwright install chromium && vitest --project=core/unit --project=browser/unit --project=reactor-extension/unit
scripts.test:unit:coverage: pnpm exec playwright install chromium && vitest run --coverage --project=core/unit --project=browser/unit --project=reactor-extension/unit
scripts.test:integration: pnpm exec playwright install chromium && vitest run --project=browser/integration --project=reactor-extension/integration
scripts.test:integration:debug: pnpm exec playwright install chromium && vitest --no-file-parallelism --project=browser/integration --project=reactor-extension/integration --browser=chromium --browser.provider=playwright --browser.headless=false
scripts.test:integration:watch: pnpm exec playwright install chromium && vitest --project=browser/integration --project=reactor-extension/integration
scripts.test:integration:coverage: pnpm exec playwright install chromium && vitest run --coverage --project=browser/integration --project=reactor-extension/integration
scripts.test:functional: pnpm exec playwright install chromium && EDGE_BASE_PATH="ee-pre-prd" ALLOY_ENV="int" testcafe chromium
scripts.test:functional:watch: pnpm exec playwright install chromium && EDGE_BASE_PATH="ee-pre-prd" ALLOY_ENV="int" ./scripts/watchFunctionalTests.js --browsers chromium
scripts.test:functional:debug: pnpm exec playwright install chromium && EDGE_BASE_PATH="ee-pre-prd" ALLOY_ENV="int" testcafe --inspect-brk chromium
scripts.test:extension: pnpm exec playwright install chromium && vitest run --project=reactor-extension/unit --project=reactor-extension/integration
